core_principles: Color is Function Only: 95% monochrome, 5% signal colors
Swiss Grid: Asymmetric, modular, border-collapse styles
Typography as UI: Bold contrast in scale, flush-left alignment
design_philosophy.emotional_tone: Objective, calming through extreme clarity, authoritative yet accessible.

rules.headings: text-4xl to text-6xl, tracking-tight, leading-none, font-black for top-level, flush-left.

colors.rules: Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Tint greys slightly. High contrast is mandatory. UI should feel like printed ink on pristine paper.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid for Dashboards: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gap (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use border-collapse style layout. Items have border-r border-b. Flat background, no shadow.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm maximum to maintain rigid Swiss feel.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strictly flush-left. Never center by default.

components_strategy.general: Heavily customize Shadcn UI components to strip standard rounding and shadows. Make them flat, sharp, and high-contrast.
components_strategy.buttons: Flat solid background. text-white bg-[#121212] hover:bg-[#27272A]. For destructive: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white. Sharp corners (rounded-none).
components_strategy.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Content highly structured. No hover lift, just border darken.
components_strategy.inputs: Flat, sharp borders, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#121212] focus:border-transparent.
components_strategy.split_view: For Document Analysis, use a 50/50 split on desktop: Left = Document Preview (PDF/Image viewer), Right = AI Extracted Data blocks in dense Swiss typography.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Crisp and instant. Backgrounds darken slightly, borders sharpen.
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: High contrast ring (black or blue) on all interactive elements for accessibility.

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Duotone or regular weight. Used sparingly, typography is preferred for hierarchy.

hero_background.description: Abstract high-contrast 3D composition of chaotic bureaucratic paperwork transforming into a clean, structured geometric grid.
hero_background.usage: Login/Signup page split background or Hero section of marketing landing page.

action_visual.description: Macro close-up of a rubber stamp hitting a document.
action_visual.usage: Visual anchor for the subscription popup or document upload empty state.

desk_paper.description: Blue and white paper on blue background.
desk_paper.usage: Marketing features block or testimonial backdrop.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: yarn add @fontsource/cabinet-grotesk @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans. Ensure they are configured in tailwind.config.js.
Use react-dropzone for the Document Upload component (drag and drop area).
Strictly adhere to the German language UI requirement (e.g., 'Dokument hochladen', 'Dringlichkeit', 'Fälligkeitsdatum').
The Output format of AI Document Analysis MUST rigidly follow the JSON structure described in the problem statement.
Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive and key informational elements (e.g., data-testid='upload-document-button').
For the priority labels, map strictly to colors: Urgent (Red #FF3B30), High (Orange #FF9500), Medium (Yellow #FFCC00), Low (Green #34C759).
Ensure the dashboard uses a Swiss Brutalist layout with 'border-collapse' like grids and absolute clarity over decoration.
